title: About
description: Learn about the mission of Vision Education and its founder, Yaw Ndaase Mensuoh. Discover how we're leveraging AI to uplift educational standards in Ghana.

title: How AI is Flipping the Script on Test Prep
description: Exploring how artificial intelligence and large language models are transforming WASSCE preparation for Ghanaian students.

title: Decoding the Core Math Syllabus Changes
description: A technical breakdown of the WASSCE Core Mathematics syllabus and expert prep strategies for Ghanaian students.

title: The Integration of Computer Science in SHS
description: Analyzing the WAEC structural shifts towards computer science and logical thinking in Ghana Senior High Schools.

title: Vision Education
description: Vision Education is Ghana's first AI-powered WASSCE preparation platform. Access core subject mock exams aligned with the official WAEC syllabus.

title: The Visionary Parent's Guide to WASSCE
description: A comprehensive guide for parents on supporting their children through the WASSCE using AI-powered study habits and leadership.

title: Partners & Brands
description: Official media kit and partnership portal for Vision Education. Discover how your brand can collaborate with Ghana's leading AI-powered educational platform.
